title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at MTR Foods
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Pune. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
